title: euphrasia rostkoviana subvar. campestris
intro: Euphrasia rostkoviana subvar. campestris is a subvariety of the Eyebright plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe, known for its distinctive blue, pink, or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Euphrasia rostkoviana subvar. campestris are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, iridoids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the relief of eye problems, such as conjunctivitis and cataracts, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. Euphrasia rostkoviana subvar. campestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
